Our Treatments

Complete Dental Care
Under One Roof

From routine check-ups to full smile transformations — every treatment delivered with expertise and compassion.

🦷
General Dentistry
Routine check-ups, scaling, fillings and preventive care to maintain your natural teeth for life.
✨
Cosmetic Dentistry
Teeth whitening, veneers, bonding and smile design for a confident, radiant you.
🔩
Dental Implants
Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements that restore function and aesthetics seamlessly.
😬
Orthodontics
Braces and clear aligners for children and adults. Straighter teeth at any age.
🫀
Root Canal Therapy
Painless endodontic treatment using advanced techniques to save and restore infected teeth.
👶
Paediatric Dentistry
Gentle, child-friendly dental care designed to build healthy habits from the very first visit.
The Space

A Clinic That
Feels Different

Designed to feel more like a lounge than a clinic — warm wood, soft lighting, and modern equipment work together to create a calm, premium experience.

🔬
UV Sterilisation Chamber
Every instrument is UV-sterilised after use. Your safety is our non-negotiable priority.
🖥️
Digital X-Ray & Intraoral Camera
Advanced imaging for precise diagnosis with minimal radiation exposure.
🪑
Ergonomic Dental Chair
Fully adjustable, comfortable chair with integrated monitor for patient-friendly explanations.
🏡
Warm, Welcoming Interiors
Carefully designed space with natural wood, warm lighting and curated art — no white, clinical anxiety here.

Dr. Shikha
Meet Your Dentist

Dr. Shikha
Swaroop

BDS · Maharashtra State Dental Council
93+
5★ Reviews
5.0
Rating
10+
Specialties

Dr. Shikha Swaroop founded Rooticle Dental Lounge with one mission: make exceptional dental care accessible, comfortable, and honest. Trained at Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences (Karad), she brings rigorous technique and a genuinely caring manner to every appointment.

Patients consistently describe her as gentle, professional and thorough — and her 93 five-star Google reviews are a testament to the trust she has built across the Hinjawadi community.

BDS · KIMS Karad Integrated Endodontics Endodontics Unplugged 2016 MH State Dental Council
Credentials

Qualified,
Certified & Trusted

Dr. Shikha holds a Bachelor of Dental Surgery from a recognised deemed university, is registered with the Maharashtra State Dental Council, and has completed advanced certifications in Endodontics.
